title: 'Why Do You Want To Be In Spotlight': How TCS Nashik Manager Persuaded Complainant To 'Drop' Sex Abuse Case
description: In her statement, the woman detailed that the harassment started during her induction in May 2023, when one of her seniors Raza Memon approached her and tried to start a personal communication with her, even asking her to reply to his riddles on Teams in “secret”.
